title: Unique Lanterns
description: Unique models for all 3 lantern types
body:
![Unique Lanterns logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d8cf113addb970e9a1d436bd852cd06901936c6_0.webp)
____________________________________________________________________________________________________
**- 📝 This pack adds 3 unique vanilla friendly models for all 3 lanterns types**
- Report issues or suggustions to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/W-aves/Unique-Lanterns-MC/issues)
__________________________________________________________________________________________________
**- ⚠️Requires continuity for emissive textures to work**
____________________________________________________________________________________________________
